installCommand: pip install -r requirements.txt && find . -path '*/tests' -type d -exec rm -rf {} + 2>/dev/null; find . -name '__pycache__' -type d -exec rm -rf {} + 2>/dev/null; find . -name '*.pyc' -delete 2>/dev/null; find . -path '*.dist-info/RECORD' -delete 2>/dev/null; find . -path '*.dist-info/INSTALLER' -delete 2>/dev/null; find . -path '*.dist-info/REQUESTED' -delete 2>/dev/null; find . -path '*.dist-info/entry_points.txt' -delete 2>/dev/null; find . -path '*.dist-info/WHEEL' -delete 2>/dev/null; find . -path '*.dist-info/METADATA' -delete 2>/dev/null; find . -path '*.dist-info/top_level.txt' -delete 2>/dev/null; find . -path '**/pandas/**/tests' -type d -exec rm -rf {} + 2>/dev/null; find . -path '**/numpy/**/tests' -type d -exec rm -rf {} + 2>/dev/null; find . -path '**/pyarrow/**/tests' -type d -exec rm -rf {} + 2>/dev/null
